title: macropiper excelsum f. psittacorum
intro: Macropiper excelsum f. psittacorum, also known as the South Sea Island Pepper or Kawakawa, is a plant native to the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Piperaceae family. The medicinal properties of Macropiper excelsum f. psittacorum include its ability to act as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant, as well as its antimicrobial and antiseptic properties. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation and pain, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Macropiper excelsum f. psittacorum can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, with the tea being a common herbal preparation used to harness its medicinal properties.
